raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Assembly Republicans unveiled a plan to lower costs for working families in California.",
    "The Republican plan aims to lower electric bills and repeal a mandate that could drive up gas prices.",
    "The proposed legislation includes increasing the renter’s tax credit.",
    "The proposals in the Republican legislative package will eliminate taxes on tips for workers such as bartenders and manicurists.",
    "The Republican plan is positioned to provide the largest middle-class tax cut in state history.",
    "Some Republican-backed bills aim to cut utility costs by 30%.",
```
